creator: rpsfa@rit.edu
text:
The failure to load the module portion of this PR may be due to changes in Heimdal 1.1 and might be fixed by updating /usr/bin/krb5-config to add -lgssapi_krb5 to the list for --libs gssapi.

-- 
Ryan Steinmetz
Lead Security/Systems Administrator
Infrastructure Engineering
Rochester Institute of Technology
585.475.5663
